provisions.content:
ADMINISTRATIVE PENALTIES, MEASURES
AND INVESTIGATORY POWERS

[ L.S.371.05

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 371.05
REGOLAMENTI DWAR ADMINISTRATIVE
PENALTIES, MEASURES AND INVESTIGATORY
POWERS*
10 ta’ April, 2015
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 131 tal-2015, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 491 tal2021, 254 tal-2024 u 46 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
